steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content: Simplify: $$f(7) = 80 - 42 = 38.$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. It's given that function $f$ is defined by $f\left(x\right)=80-6x$. The value of $f\left(7\right)$ can be found by substituting $7$ for $x$ in the given function, which yields $f\left(7\right)=80-6\left(7\right)$, or $f\left(7\right)=80-42$, which is equivalent to $f\left(7\right)=38$. Therefore, the value of $f\left(7\right)$ is $38$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $80-67$, not $80-6\left(7\right)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $80-6\left(1\right)$, not $80-6\left(7\right)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $80-6+7$, not $80-6\left(7\right)$.
